Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class WebCartAdjustmentGroup

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.WebCartAdjustmentGroup
public class WebCartAdjustmentGroup extends SObject

Java class for WebCartAdjustmentGroup complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="WebCartAdjustmentGroup">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AdjustmentBasisReference" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Coupon" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AdjustmentBasisReferenceId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AdjustmentSource" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AdjustmentTargetType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AdjustmentType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AdjustmentValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Cart" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}WebCart" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CartId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PriceAdjustmentCause" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Promotion" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PriceAdjustmentCauseId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Priority" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalAmountWithTax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WebCartAdjustmentGroups" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
